author: Alex S
subject: v2.3.1
body: ## [2.3.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.3.0...v2.3.1) (2017-12-04) ### Bug Fixes * **connectors:** check facet is refined before removing it. hierarchicalMenu / menu ([67ae035](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/67ae035)) * **poweredBy:** minify slightly and make into correct URL ([#2615](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2615)) ([2b7d747](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/2b7d747)), closes [#2613](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2613)
